The Realm of the Learning Vault — ATD SC Chapter 80th Anniversary Escape Room

The Realm of the Learning Vault

ATD SC Chapter · 80th Anniversary Learning Event

"The ancient Learning Vault has been sealed by a dark enchantment. Six mystical chambers stand between you and its treasures of knowledge. Each guardian has hidden a key — solve their riddles, prove your mastery, and claim the title: Master of the Learning Realm."

Adventurer's Codex

  • Complete all six chambers in order to unlock the Vault
  • Each chamber features different types of puzzles and challenges
  • Earn a key at the end of each chamber to unlock the next
  • Up to 3 progressive hints are available per puzzle
  • Enter your final key in MS Teams to claim victory
Chamber I
🔑

Chamber Complete!

You have earned a key.

VAULT-XXX

Copy this key — you will need it to enter the next chamber.

🔒

Chamber II Awaits

Enter the key from the previous chamber to unlock this door.

✨🏆✨

The Vault Is Open!

You Have Mastered the Learning Realm

"The final seal shatters. Ancient golden light floods the chamber as the great doors of the Learning Vault swing wide. Its treasures of knowledge are yours to claim. You have proven yourself a true master of the talent development arts, ."

🏆 Your Final Victory Code

ATD80-VAULT-OPEN

Post this code in the MS Teams event chat to officially claim your victory and complete the ATD SC Chapter 80th Anniversary Escape Room!
